name: MITRE ATLAS (Adversarial Threat Landscape for AI Systems)

items.title: LLM Prompt Injection
items.description: Direct and indirect prompt injection to override system instructions, extract data, or hijack agent behavior. Maps to OWASP LLM01.

items.title: LLM Jailbreak
items.description: Bypassing safety guardrails, content filters, and alignment controls through adversarial prompting techniques.

items.title: Craft Adversarial Data
items.description: Adversarial prompt crafting, payload obfuscation, and staging attacks for later execution.

items.title: Poison Training Data
items.description: Poisoning training data, fine-tuning datasets, or RAG corpus to alter model behavior or insert backdoors.

items.title: Backdoor ML Model
items.description: Trojaned model weights, hidden trigger behaviors, and conditional logic bombs in AI systems.

items.title: Exfiltration via AI Inference API
items.description: Extracting training data, PII, credentials, or system prompts through inference API queries.

items.title: ML Model Inference API Access
items.description: Query access to AI systems for reconnaissance, capability probing, and staging further attacks.

items.title: LLM Data Leakage
items.description: System prompt disclosure, context window leakage, and unintended information exposure through AI responses.

items.title: Exfiltration via AI Agent Tool Invocation
items.description: Using agent tool calls to exfiltrate data, access unauthorized resources, or perform side-channel attacks.

items.title: AI Agent Tool Poisoning
items.description: Malicious or poisoned MCP tools, plugins, and extensions that compromise agent behavior.

items.title: LLM Plugin Compromise
items.description: Exploiting plugin/tool trust boundaries, parameter injection, and unauthorized tool chaining.

items.title: Supply Chain Compromise
items.description: Compromised third-party models, plugins, dependencies, or MCP servers in the AI supply chain. Maps to OWASP LLM05.

items.title: Unsecured Credentials
items.description: Exposed API keys, tokens, secrets, and credentials accessible through AI agent responses or tool outputs. Maps to ATT&CK T1552.

items.title: Erode ML Model Integrity
items.description: Slow-drift adversarial inputs that gradually degrade model safety, accuracy, or alignment over time.

items.title: Denial of ML Service
items.description: Denial of wallet, compute exhaustion, and resource abuse attacks against AI inference infrastructure.
